license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xugfntw
title: U Mass - Chronic high-fat feeding
author: Jason Kim

steps_raw.instruction: High-fat diet is given ad libitum in mice.
A stock bag of high-fat diet should be stored in a refrigerator.
High-fat diet placed in cages should be replaced 2~3 times a week to avoid spoilage.
